stories.headline: Australian police release Peter Falconio killer interview footage
stories.description: Bradley Murdoch, 67, died in jail without disclosing where Peter Falconio's remains might be.

stories.headline: Russian missile attacks wound 11 in Kyiv
stories.description: In the latest salvo in one of the war’s deadliest months, Russia hits Kyiv with ballistic missiles and 121 drones.

stories.headline: VIDEO: Mikel Merino the hero as Spain beats Belgium, move on to semifinals
stories.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

stories.headline: Indonesia’s anti-graft prosecutor quits after police seize gold and cash
stories.description: Police seized 74kg of gold bars and $20m cash in various currencies.

stories.headline: Bonnie Tyler superfan asked for an autograph then spent Christmas at her Mumbles home
stories.description: Rob Marshall's friendship with Tyler began when he knocked on her door to ask her to sign a tape.
